items.title: Ronaldo's World Cup farewell ends in defeat as Merino fires Spain into last eight
items.summary: The late substitute scores into added time, putting the seal on a cagey trans-Iberian World Cup Round of 16 contest in Dallas.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sri Lanka try to make a play after Greaves 180, Hope 112
items.summary: Sri Lanka reached 92 for 2 at stumps, extending their lead to 142 going into the final day
